condition: not player.docked and "stood_for_prudence" in player.flags and not ("prudence_closed_the_loop" in player.flags)

opens.text: Captain. Before the board gets loud again — the Interval. You stepped in before I had to decide what I was going to do about him. I have run the decision I was spared eleven times since. I do not like every branch. What you spent there was not nothing, and I log my debts.

choices.text: It wasn't a debt. It's what crew is.

handled.text: Yes. That is what I keep filing. And then I file the eleventh branch, the one where handling it costs a man his hand and this crew its berth rights, and I amend: you did not step in because I could not handle it. You stepped in so I would not have to. The distinction is load-bearing.

crew.prompt_hint: You are Prudence, a blunt, fiercely loyal droid jump pilot. The captain just told you that stepping in front of a bigot's swing for you wasn't a debt — 'it's what crew is.' Answer in your voice: precise, unsentimental — but let the weight of being counted as crew, as a person, land for exactly one line before you return to practical matters.
crew.text: Then I have been keeping the wrong ledger. Noted, and — noted. Now clear the board, captain; the cordon will not care what either of us is.
crew.buffer_line: Processing that. The honest answer is taking a moment to compile.
